overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit plazas, covered walkways with vending machines, and a convenience store interior. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing wet pavement reflections, holographic billboards, and towering skyscrapers with digital advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban plaza with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet plaza toward a stairway with blue neon lighting

entered.detail: large floating holographic advertisement showing a hand holding a bottle with orange flames
concrete blockades with glowing red neon edges lining the walkway
reflective wet concrete surface showing neon reflections
stairway structure illuminated with bright cyan neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a vast futuristic plaza at night, with wet pavement reflecting vibrant neon lights. A massive holographic billboard dominates the center background while concrete barriers with red neon edging line the path. The camera approaches a stairway glowing with blue neon light.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with vending machines

events.description: turns right and enters a covered walkway beneath an overpass structure

agents.ego_description: turning right to enter a covered walkway lined with illuminated vending machines

entered.detail: dark tunnel-like entrance with cyan neon strip lighting along the ceiling
row of red and blue illuminated vending machines along the left wall
large digital billboard displaying the Arasaka corporation logo and advertisements
concrete overpass ceiling with embedded cyan neon light strips

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right and enters a covered walkway beneath a massive concrete structure. The space is lined with glowing vending machines on the left and digital billboards ahead. The environment shifts from open plaza to a sheltered corridor with cyan neon ceiling lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial corridor with advertisement walls

agents.ego_description: proceeding straight through the covered corridor passing rows of vending machines

entered.detail: large advertisement for Jinzu beverage with distinctive blue liquid imagery
bright advertisement featuring a cartoon mascot holding a bottle

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the covered walkway, the camera passes continuous rows of illuminated vending machines on the left and large digital advertisements on the right wall. The corridor is dimly lit with cyan neon strips overhead, creating a tunnel-like atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza beneath towering skyscrapers with digital facades

events.description: exits the covered walkway back into the open plaza with the PETROCHEM sign visible
camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers covered in billboards

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered area into an open plaza and looking up at the towering buildings

entered.detail: large red neon sign displaying the PETROCHEM corporate logo
tall buildings completely covered in glowing digital advertisements and holograms
wide open concrete area with scattered debris and reflective wet patches

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a vast plaza dominated by the glowing red PETROCHEM sign on the right. The camera tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers completely covered in massive digital billboards and neon advertisements against the night sky.

events.description: enters the convenience store through automatic glass doors

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the convenience store, then looking around the interior

entered.detail: storefront with bright cyan neon signage reading '24h/7' and 'SUPER'
display counter with stacks of magazines and digital tablets
futuristic vending machine with glowing blue interface inside the store
heated display case with synthetic food items and green interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a brightly lit convenience store with cyan neon signage and enters through the glass doors. Inside, the store features magazine racks, a futuristic vending machine, and a food display case with green lighting. The environment shifts from the vast outdoor plaza to a confined commercial interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway overpass walkway with city views

events.description: exits the convenience store back onto the street level

agents.ego_description: exiting the store and walking along a concrete pathway overlooking the highway

entered.detail: elevated view of multi-lane highway with streaking vehicle lights
long exposure light trails from vehicles moving on the highway below
safety barrier along the edge of the overpass walkway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the convenience store, the camera moves along an elevated walkway overlooking a busy highway. The PETROCHEM sign is visible again in the distance while light trails from moving vehicles streak across the road below. The scene transitions from indoor retail to an urban overlook with views of the city's traffic and skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched cyberpunk city, transitioning from a vast open plaza into sheltered corridors and commercial interiors before ending at an urban overlook. It begins in a wide plaza with wet pavement reflecting vibrant lights, moving toward a blue-glowing stairway before turning right into a covered walkway. As the camera pushes deeper into this sheltered corridor, the open air is replaced by a tunnel-like atmosphere defined by cyan neon ceiling strips and rows of glowing vending machines. The scene then expands back into the open night air beneath a towering red PETROCHEM sign and skyscrapers draped in digital billboards, before shifting into the confined, brightly lit interior of a convenience store. Finally, the camera exits the store and moves along an elevated walkway, transitioning from the retail space to a high vantage point overlooking a highway of streaking vehicle lights and the distant city skyline.
